arts.ttl: Liverpool line up potential Andy Robertson replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool are pursuing a deal to sign Bournemouth left-back Milos Kerkez as the club look for a long-term replacement for Andy Robertson. Kerkez has caught the eye since his £15m move to Bournemouth in 2023, with Liverpool sporting director Richard Hughes having overseen that deal during his time on the south coast. He has […] The post Liverpool line up potential Andy Robertson replacement first appeared on The Football Faithful.
